name: Dymamite Chili with Beans
recipeIngredient: 2/3 pound Boneless pork cut into 1/2 inch cubes
1 Diced Jalapeno pepper OR Serrano pepper
2 tablespoons Tortilla flour mixed with water to form a paste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water and beans in a medium saucepan and bring to boil over medium-high heat.
2. Reduce heat and simmer until tender, about 1 hour.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add onion, green pepper, and garlic. Sauté until tender.
5. Transfer vegetables to the Dutch oven and set aside.
6. Add pork and beef to the skillet. Brown well.
7. Stir into the vegetables in the Dutch oven.
8. Add beans and their liquid along with tomatoes and seasonings. Mix well.
9. Cover and simmer for 1 hour.
10. Add wine and cook, uncovered, for 30 minutes.
11. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
12. If the mixture is too liquid, stir in some of the tortilla flour paste to thicken.
